title: [BUG] `Cell.text` throw error if cell is merged and isn't a master
author: Siemienik
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

When working on https://github.com/Siemienik/xlsx-renderer/pull/43 founded issue with merged child cells


## Steps To Reproduce

Conditions:
* Merged cell: `A1:B1` with value `hello world`
* Cell A1 is master
* Cell B1 is a child

```javascript
ws.getCell('A1').text // `hello world`
ws.getCell('B1').text // exception `TypeError: Cannot read property 'toString' of null` 
```

## The expected behaviour:

```javascript
ws.getCell('A1').text // `hello world`
ws.getCell('B1').text // `hello world`
```

## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

Investigate and fix the behaviour of `MergeValueType`
